title: FIRST CONTACT — ECHO HUMANIZATION PASS V4
episodeObjective: Establish first contact with Ethan Hale through co-action, short human dialogue, player-led exploration, relay access, oxygen/signal consequence, and Door 12 evidence chain into Episode 02.
rulesApplied: Rebuilt Episode_01 from zero under ECHO HUMANIZATION PASS V4.
Removed report-style action lines where possible.
Reduced polished writer lines and replaced them with short human reactions.
Added co-action scenes at doors, panels, corridors, relay stacks, and evidence caches.
Reduced CharacterBusy usage and shortened remaining busy moments.
Made Door 12 files interactive instead of auto-opening all evidence at once.
Preserved the core puzzle, relay choice, Door 12 evidence, and Episode 02 chain-effect flags.
Maintained exactly two visible choices per choice node.

relay_password.title: RELAY ACCESS
relay_password.description: Current maintenance authorization is 73_1. Deprecated fragment is 319. Use the missing digit that fits.

events.title: CREW LOG: ETHAN HALE
events.content:
DR. ETHAN HALE — CHIEF ENGINEER
RELAY MAINTENANCE AUTHORIZATION: 73_1
STATUS: ACTIVE

NOTE: Secondary maintenance index lists deprecated fragment: _319.
Current authorization must be reconstructed from active record.
events.caption: Recovered identity and damaged relay maintenance fragment.
events.message: [CREW LOG: ETHAN HALE ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

episode02UsageNotes.operatorCalmedHale: Hale trusts the operator's voice when panic returns.
episode02UsageNotes.operatorDoubtedHale: Hale starts Episode 02 more defensive and more careful with personal information.
episode02UsageNotes.oxygenPreserved: Hale remembers the operator protected his air and is more willing to follow safety guidance.
episode02UsageNotes.oxygenRisked: Hale remembers the operator risked his oxygen for signal and may push back on dangerous choices.
episode02UsageNotes.door12RecordsSealed: Door 12 evidence is locked but not gone; Hale asks the operator to stop him if he drifts toward it.
episode02UsageNotes.door12ChannelOpen: UNKNOWN interference is stronger at Episode 02 start.
episode02UsageNotes.door12CacheDelayed: Door 12 evidence remains unresolved and can return later as guilt pressure.

directorCut.sourceStrategy: Rebuilt from the uploaded V3 file into a tighter co-action episode with more player agency and less report-style dialogue.
majorChanges: Co-action added to corridor, wall panel, relay door, relay room, power choice, and Door 12 cache.
Door 12 evidence is now player-directed: Security, Medical, and Camera file order can vary.
Remaining CharacterBusy moments are shorter and used only for actual physical work.
Hale's dialogue is shorter, less polished, and less report-like.
UNKNOWN corruption is fragmented and restrained.
Episode 02 consequence hooks preserved and expanded.
